column2: Edit the "Your Content" column only. Do not change anything in Column A.
1. Replace every "Write here" placeholder with your own text. 2. Leave ACTION rows blank if not needed. 3. Save the file as CSV. 4. Click "Import CSV" in your browser.

column3: Notes (this column is ignored by the importer)
Optional — appears in the browser tab
Required — appears in the centre red cell of the chart
Pillar 1 appears in the top-left section
Pillar 2 appears in the top-centre section
Pillar 3 appears in the top-right section
Pillar 4 appears in the middle-left section
Pillar 5 appears in the middle-right section
Pillar 6 appears in the bottom-left section
Pillar 7 appears in the bottom-centre section
Pillar 8 appears in the bottom-right section
